title: Complete distortion:Infection from otherworld
description: This mod brings new infection to the world of Minecraft.
body:
This mod brings new infection to the world of Minecraft.

Inspired by Scape and Run:Parasites and Stranger things:Season 3.
Main point of mod is to add overhaul in Minecraft 1.20 and give the same felling as SRP:Parasites. 

This mod needs the GeckoLib to work!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FkspAIjoqrs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

At the moment there are 4 stages of evolution, they change by itself

 

-Stage 1: In the overworld will spawn fractures that will corrupt mobs around and transform them in deformed flesh. Deformed flesh will grow in one of 4 deformed mobs. When fracture disappears after period of time it has 15% chance to spawn Bloody totem that won't despawn, will infect blocks around and spawn mobs to defend itself.


-Stage 2: Deformed mobs now spawning by itself. Bloody totem now have 20% chance to spawn. Bloody totems after few minutes will evolve in stage 2 that stronger and spawn mobs faster.


-Stage 3: Bloody totem now have 25% chance to spawn. Now mobs can merge with deformed flesh and evolve into their decaying versions.

 

-Stage 4: Bloody totem now have 30% chance to spawn. Bloody totems stage 2 after few minutes will evolve into stage 3. Decaying versions can now spawn on their own

 

All news about this mod you can see on my YT channel; [Kaboom entertainment - YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@kaboomentertainment4534/featured)

 

Huge thanks to my testers La criatura, Demonic_madness and Hetz. Also, thank you for your support, it really is very valuable to me.
